{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions Toolformer but doesn't clearly articulate the delta in terms of training paradigm or tool integration.",
    "R1.7": "Doesn't identify any missing citations or inaccuracies. ",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions but mentions a fourth tool not in the prompt.",
    "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content or regressions; however, lacks specific analysis of potential biases.",
    "RX.5": "Mentions using self-generated data but doesn't provide details on how non-cosmetic changes are traced."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions Toolformer but doesn't clearly articulate the delta in terms of training paradigm or tool integration.
rationale.R1.7: Doesn't identify any missing citations or inaccuracies.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but mentions a fourth tool not in the prompt.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content or regressions; however, lacks specific analysis of potential biases.
rationale.RX.5: Mentions using self-generated data but doesn't provide details on how non-cosmetic changes are traced.
